query: ( "heat-health early warning" OR "heat health early warning" OR "cold spell advisory" OR "biometeorological advisory" OR "forecast-based action" OR "anticipatory action" OR "weather-triggered public health" OR "weather alert" OR "meteorological alert" ) AND ( "temperature threshold" OR "apparent temperature" OR "humidex" OR "bioclimatic index" OR "heat index" OR "synoptic forecast" OR "UTCI" OR "Universal Thermal Climate Index" ) AND ( "excess mortality" OR "heat-related mortality" OR "cold-related mortality" OR "cardiorespiratory" OR "harvesting effect" OR "mortality displacement" OR "population attributable fraction" ) AND ( "causal inference" OR "causal effect" OR "causal model" OR "counterfactual" OR "regression discontinuity" OR "synthetic control" OR "quasi-experimental" OR "instrumental variable" OR "two-stage least squares" OR "natural experiment" OR "treatment effect" OR "difference-in-differences" OR "administrative threshold" OR "policy discontinuity" )
